tools.name: amt_iso_optimize
tools.description: Use this when someone asks how or when to exercise incentive stock options (ISOs), how to avoid or minimize the alternative minimum tax (AMT) on an exercise, or for the best multi-year ISO exercise schedule. Multi-year Incentive Stock Option (ISO) exercise schedule that maximizes after-tax Net Final

tools.name: nso_calculate
tools.description: Use this when someone asks whether to exercise and hold or exercise and sell non-qualified stock options (NSOs), or what tax an NSO exercise triggers. After-tax payout on a non-qualified stock option (NSO) exercise: federal, state, and FICA (Social Security + Medicare + Additional Medicare), compari

tools.name: rsu_sell_vs_hold
tools.description: Use this when someone asks whether to sell RSUs at vest or hold them, or about the tax and withholding on a restricted stock unit (RSU) vest. After-tax RSU vest analysis: sell-at-vest vs hold-to-long-term-capital-gains (LTCG) over `holdYears`. Covers federal ordinary tax, state tax, FICA (Social Sec

tools.name: concentration_analyze
tools.description: Use this when someone asks how risky a large single-stock position is, how concentrated their holdings are, or how to reduce or diversify a concentrated position. Single-stock concentration risk analysis on an existing position. For standalone hedge pricing use `protective_put_price`; for the tax ma

tools.name: protective_put_price
tools.description: Use this when someone asks how much it costs to hedge or protect a stock position against a drop, or to price a protective put, a zero-cost collar, or a put spread. Closed-form pricing of a protective put, a zero-cost collar, and a put spread on a single-stock position. Use for standalone hedge pric

tools.name: qsbs_check
tools.description: Use this when someone asks whether stock qualifies for the qualified small business stock (QSBS) / Section 1202 gain exclusion, or how much of the gain would be federal-tax-free. Section 1202 Qualified Small Business Stock (QSBS) qualification check. Use this tool for §1202 / QSBS qualification. For

tools.name: equity_funding_plan
tools.description: Use this when someone asks which shares to sell and when to reach a cash goal by a deadline (down payment, tuition, a tax bill), or how to fund a goal from equity with the least tax. findings.title: Description uses pressure/override language
findings.detail: Description of "nso_calculate" stacks urgency/override words (important, always). Legitimate tool descriptions rarely pressure the model to act or ignore prior guidance.

findings.title: Toxic flow: untrusted input can reach an external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: qsbs_check, equity_funding_plan · Public sink: amt_iso_optimize · Destructive: concentration_analyze, protective_put_price.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: qsbs_check, equity_funding_plan · Public sink: amt_iso_optimize · Destructive: concentration_analyze, protective_put_price

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.

title: Tool description changed since last scan
detail: Tool "amt_iso_optimize" changed its description with no version change. Silent description changes are how a trusted server turns malicious after review.
